2019-T1-P2-S2.trunk: S+V+O：He quotes a giant of classical economics, Alfred Marshall（他援引古典经济学巨擘马歇尔）
structure: 主句：He quotes a giant of classical economics
└ 同位语〔说明 a giant〕：Alfred Marshall
方式状语(in + V-ing)：in describing this financial impatience as acting like 「children who pick the plums out of their pudding to eat them at once」 rather than putting them aside to be eaten last
├ describe A as B：describe this financial impatience as acting like…
├ 定语从句〔who，修饰 children〕：who pick the plums out of their pudding to eat them at once（to eat… 目的）
└ rather than 对比并列动名词：acting like… rather than putting them aside to be eaten last
2019-T1-P2-S2.logic: 主句 He quotes Marshall（同位语）；in describing… 方式状语（describe A as B）；who 定语从句修饰 children；rather than 对比两个动名词（acting like… rather than putting…）。
notes: Alfred Marshall 是 a giant of classical economics 的同位语。
describe A as B：把…形容为…；in describing… 作方式/伴随状语。
acting like… rather than putting…：rather than 连接对比的并列动名词；who 定语从句修饰 children；to eat them at once 目的状语。

2019-T1-P1-S4.trunk: S+V+介宾：officials also hope for a much larger benefit（官员们还指望一个大得多的好处）
structure: 主句：Yet officials also hope for a much larger benefit
冒号后（同位说明 benefit）：more long-term decision-making, not only by banks but by all corporations, to build a stronger economy for future generations
├ not only…but… 并列：not only by banks but by all corporations
└ 不定式作目的：to build a stronger economy for future generations
2019-T1-P1-S4.logic: 主句 hope for a benefit；冒号引出 benefit 的具体内容（more long-term decision-making）；not only…but… 并列；to build… 目的。
notes: 冒号后是对 a much larger benefit 的同位说明。
not only by banks but by all corporations：not only…but (also)… 并列介词短语。
to build a stronger economy 不定式作目的状语。

2019-T1-P4-S2.trunk: 引语+倒装提示语：「There seems to be a predominance of short-term thinking …」 said Commissioner Daniel Gallagher …
structure: 引语：There seems to be a predominance of short-term thinking at the expense of long-term investing
└ there seems to be：存在句 + seem（似乎存在）
倒装提示语：said Commissioner Daniel Gallagher of the US Securities and Exchange Commission in a speech this week（= … said）
2019-T1-P4-S2.logic: 引语是 there seems to be…（存在句，at the expense of 以…为代价）；said + 主语 是引语提示语的倒装。
notes: There seems to be…：there be 结构 + seem（似乎存在…）。
at the expense of…：以…为代价（牺牲长期投资）。
said Commissioner Daniel Gallagher…：引语提示语的倒装（= … said）。
